source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for dense product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, strong dashboard metrics, compact navigation, and precise numeric rhythm.
layout: Disciplined 8px grids, 8px-or-less component radii, black-green dividers, dimpled chitin texture panels, compact enterprise navigation, and high-gloss analytics surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Jewel Beetle motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Jewel Beetle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated jewel beetle shell / full jewel beetle dorsal cutout for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A jewel beetle viewed from above with accurate beetle anatomy, elongated iridescent elytra shell, metallic emerald green base, gold rim highlights, sapphire blue flashes, glossy black legs and antennae, tiny shell dimples and faceted reflective microtexture, crisp silhouette edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full shell, head, legs, and antennae without cropping; keep the insect separated from the background.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves metallic green, gold, blue, and black surfaces without cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no leaves, no flowers, no branch, no landscape, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Jewel Beetle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Jewel Beetle" / "Jewel Beetle Shell", a premium dashboard system and shadcn/tweakcn theme reference.
Canvas: high-resolution 3840x2160 style source board, wide 16:9. Use a disciplined product UI layout with large readable labels, not tiny dense text.
Motif source: jewel beetle shell from tropical forest; metallic emerald green elytra, gold rim highlights, sapphire/cobalt blue flashes, glossy black legs, tiny dimpled shell texture, hard reflective chitin.
Palette: Pearl Canopy #f4f2e8, Beetle Ink #09110f, Elytra Green #00a86b, Gilded Edge #d6a83a, Sapphire Flash #0b66c3, Chitin Black #141716, Moss Veil #7b8f72, Rain Glass #d8e8df, Deep Teal #06473f.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Component language: premium dashboard UI, precise 8px grid, cards and controls radius 8px or less, thin black-green borders, metallic green primary buttons, gold focus rings, blue data accents, subtle dimpled chitin texture, glossy but restrained highlights, compact enterprise navigation.
Typography: include English UI samples and Japanese UI samples with clean sans guidance; use short readable labels.
Style/medium: realistic UI design-system board, polished product dashboard components, white/pearl surfaces, green-gold-blue accents, restrained premium feel.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no beige-only theme, no unrelated bright colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no oversized marketing hero, no rounded radii above 8px.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Jewel Beetle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Jewel Beetle" / "Jewel Beetle Shell", translated from the light premium dashboard system into dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: high-resolution 3840x2160 style source board, wide 16:9. Use a disciplined product UI layout with large readable labels, not tiny dense text.
Motif source: same tropical jewel beetle shell; metallic emerald green elytra, gold rim highlights, sapphire/cobalt blue flashes, glossy black chitin, tiny dimpled shell texture, hard reflective surfaces.
Palette roles: Deep Chitin #06100e as background, Rain Pearl #e7f3ec as text, Black Glass #101918 cards, Elytra Green #00c67a primary, Gilded Edge #d6a83a focus/accent, Sapphire Flash #2a7ee8 info/data, Moss Veil #9aad89 secondary, Deep Teal #06473f surfaces, Error Ruby #c34040 destructive.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Component language: premium dark dashboard UI, precise 8px grid, cards and controls radius 8px or less, thin green-black borders, luminous metallic green primary buttons, gold focus rings, blue chart accents, subtle dimpled chitin texture, glossy highlights on dark glass, compact enterprise navigation.
Typography: include English UI samples and Japanese UI samples with clean sans guidance; use short readable labels.
Style/medium: realistic UI design-system board, polished product dashboard components, deep black-green surfaces, green-gold-blue accents, restrained premium feel.
Constraints: no neon rainbow palette, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated bright colors, no pure flat black empty background, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no oversized marketing hero, no rounded radii above 8px.
